infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Trimswipe needs access to your photo library so you can swipe through your photos and free up storage.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Trimswipe may save optimized versions of your photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Trimswipe needs access to your photos so you can review and clean up your camera roll.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Trimswipe may save optimized versions of your photos.
